revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 宇久須神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]1269-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[積羽八重事代主命]] |社格 = [[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月3日 |神事 = }} '''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]にある[[神社]]。[[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|伊豆国の式内社]]の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建不詳だが、[[式内社]]なので『[[延喜式神名帳]]』が作られた[[延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - [[コトバンク]]</ref>。
古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:うくすしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:西伊豆町]]

{{神社 |名称 = 宇久須神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]1269-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[積羽八重事代主命]] |社格 = [[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月3日 |神事 = }} '''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]にある[[神社]]。[[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|伊豆国の式内社]]の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建不詳だが、[[式内社]]なので『[[延喜式神名帳]]』が作られた[[延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - [[コトバンク]]</ref>。
古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:うくすしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:西伊豆町]]

古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

revision.comment: 9 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 宇久須神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]1269-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[積羽八重事代主命]] |社格 = [[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月3日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=宇久須神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]にある[[神社]]。[[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|伊豆国の式内社]]の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建不詳だが、[[式内社]]なので『[[延喜式神名帳]]』が作られた[[延長 (元号)|延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - [[コトバンク]]</ref>。
古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:うくすしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:西伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:西伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

{{translated page|ja|宇久須神社|version=103460264|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 宇久須神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]1269-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[積羽八重事代主命]] |社格 = [[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月3日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=宇久須神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]にある[[神社]]。[[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|伊豆国の式内社]]の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建不詳だが、[[式内社]]なので『[[延喜式神名帳]]』が作られた[[延長 (元号)|延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - [[コトバンク]]</ref>。
古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}
{{DEFAULTSORT:うくすしんしや}} [[Category:静岡県の神社]] [[Category:静岡県の旧村社]] [[Category:伊豆国の式内社]] [[Category:西伊豆町の建築物]] [[Category:西伊豆町の歴史]] [[Category:三島・大山祇信仰]]
==End Japanese==

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}

==End Japanese==

== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 宇久須神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]1269-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[積羽八重事代主命]] |社格 = [[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月3日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=宇久須神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]にある[[神社]]。[[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|伊豆国の式内社]]の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建不詳だが、[[式内社]]なので『[[延喜式神名帳]]』が作られた[[延長 (元号)|延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - [[コトバンク]]</ref>。
古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。

{{translated page|ja|宇久須神社|version=103460264|comment=Imported full ja history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]]
== Japanese Wikipedia content == {{神社 |名称 = 宇久須神社 |画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=賀茂郡}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=12|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}}} |所在地 = [[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]1269-1 |位置 = {{Coord|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E|region:JP-22_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[積羽八重事代主命]] |社格 = [[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|式内社]]、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月3日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=宇久須神社|coordinates= {{coord2|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、[[静岡県]][[賀茂郡]][[西伊豆町]][[宇久須]]にある[[神社]]。[[伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|伊豆国の式内社]]の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。
== 概要 == 創建不詳だが、[[式内社]]なので『[[延喜式神名帳]]』が作られた[[延長 (元号)|延長]]5年（[[927年]]）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - [[コトバンク]]</ref>。
古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、[[1874年]]（[[明治]]7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。
[[2022年]]（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。
== 祭神 == * [[積羽八重事代主命]]
== 文化財 == * 本殿 - [[慶長]]3年（[[1598年]]）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。 * 釣[[灯籠]] - 慶長14年（[[1609年]]）11月、[[大久保長安]]奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。 * [[三十六歌仙]]絵 - 慶長17年（[[1612年]]）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。
== 脚注 == {{Reflist}}

{{nihongo|'''Ugusu Shrine'''|宇久須神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]].

'''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|西伊豆町|Q1203949}}{{jalink|宇久須}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|Q11380552|伊豆国の式内社}}の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。

== 概要 ==
創建不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}なので『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』が作られた{{jalink|延長 (元号)|Q1327274|延長}}5年（{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}</ref>。

古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、{{jalink|1874年|Q7761}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。

{{jalink|2022年|Q49625}}（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|積羽八重事代主命}}

== 文化財 ==
* 本殿 - {{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}3年（{{jalink|1598年|Q6800}}）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。
* 釣{{jalink|灯籠|Q12012294}} - 慶長14年（{{jalink|1609年|Q6762}}）11月、{{jalink|大久保長安|Q133746}}奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。
* {{jalink|三十六歌仙|Q671039}}絵 - 慶長17年（{{jalink|1612年|Q6771}}）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。

== 脚注 ==
{{Reflist}}


==End Japanese==

|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=宇久須神社|coordinates=
{{coord2|34|50|52.5|N|138|47|28.9|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
'''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|西伊豆町|Q1203949}}{{jalink|宇久須}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|Q11380552|伊豆国の式内社}}の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
創建不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}なので『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』が作られた{{jalink|延長 (元号)|Q1327274|延長}}5年（{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}</ref>。

古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、{{jalink|1874年|Q7761}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。

{{jalink|2022年|Q49625}}（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|積羽八重事代主命}}

=== 文化財 ===
* 本殿 - {{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}3年（{{jalink|1598年|Q6800}}）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。
* 釣{{jalink|灯籠|Q12012294}} - 慶長14年（{{jalink|1609年|Q6762}}）11月、{{jalink|大久保長安|Q133746}}奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。
* {{jalink|三十六歌仙|Q671039}}絵 - 慶長17年（{{jalink|1612年|Q6771}}）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。

=== 脚注 ===

'''宇久須神社'''（うぐすじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|静岡県|Q131320}}{{jalink|賀茂郡|Q961511}}{{jalink|西伊豆町|Q1203949}}{{jalink|宇久須}}にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。{{jalink|伊豆国の式内社一覧#式内社|Q11380552|伊豆国の式内社}}の1つである<ref name="yuisho">境内由緒書</ref>。

=== 概要 ===
創建不詳だが、{{jalink|式内社}}なので『{{jalink|延喜式神名帳|Q11064932}}』が作られた{{jalink|延長 (元号)|Q1327274|延長}}5年（{{jalink|927年|Q30470}}）以前に遡る<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 神名帳とは] - {{jalink|コトバンク|Q11302260}}</ref>。

古来から宇久須大明神/三嶋大明神と称し、農業漁業商業の神様として崇敬されてきたが、{{jalink|1874年|Q7761}}（{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}7年）9月に宇久須神社へと改名<ref name="yuisho"/>。

{{jalink|2022年|Q49625}}（令和4年）、西伊豆硝子舎の主催で、拝殿に240個の風鈴を飾り付ける「風鈴神社」イベントが開催された<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf 風鈴神社] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ 西伊豆硝子舎] - いこうよ西伊豆</ref>。

=== 祭神 ===
* {{jalink|積羽八重事代主命}}

=== 文化財 ===
* 本殿 - {{jalink|慶長|Q1328185}}3年（{{jalink|1598年|Q6800}}）3月造営<ref name="yuisho"/>。
* 釣{{jalink|灯籠|Q12012294}} - 慶長14年（{{jalink|1609年|Q6762}}）11月、{{jalink|大久保長安|Q133746}}奉納<ref name="yuisho"/>。県指定有形文化財<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya 宇久須神社] - 西伊豆町観光協会</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html しずおか文化財ナビ 釣燈篭] - 静岡県</ref>。
* {{jalink|三十六歌仙|Q671039}}絵 - 慶長17年（{{jalink|1612年|Q6771}}）8月、服部大蔵 外二名寄進<ref name="yuisho"/>。

=== 脚注 ===
{{Reflist}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:うくすしんしや}}

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Ugusu}}, {{jalink|Nishiizu Town|Q1203949}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}. It is one of the {{jalink|Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|Shikinai shrines of Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{jalink|Shikinai shrine}}, it dates back to before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, the 5th year of {{jalink|Enchō (era)|Q1327274|Enchō}}, when the '{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{jalink|Kotobank|Q11302260}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{jalink|1874|Q7761}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{jalink|2022|Q49625}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{jalink|1598|Q6800}} ({{jalink|Keichō|Q1328185}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{jalink|lantern|Q12012294}} - Dedicated in November {{jalink|1609|Q6762}} (Keichō 14) by {{jalink|Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{jalink|Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039}} paintings - Donated in August {{jalink|1612|Q6771}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

=== Notes ===

In {{jalink|2022|Q49625}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{jalink|1598|Q6800}} ({{jalink|Keichō|Q1328185}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{jalink|lantern|Q12012294}} - Dedicated in November {{jalink|1609|Q6762}} (Keichō 14) by {{jalink|Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{jalink|Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039}} paintings - Donated in August {{jalink|1612|Q6771}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Ugusu}}, {{jalink|Nishiizu Town|Q1203949}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}. It is one of the {{jalink|Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|Shikinai shrines of Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{jalink|Shikinai shrine}}, it dates back to before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, the 5th year of {{jalink|Enchō (era)|Q1327274|Enchō}}, when the '{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{jalink|Kotobank|Q11302260}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{jalink|1874|Q7761}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{jalink|2022|Q49625}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{jalink|1598|Q6800}} ({{jalink|Keichō|Q1328185}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{jalink|lantern|Q12012294}} - Dedicated in November {{jalink|1609|Q6762}} (Keichō 14) by {{jalink|Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{jalink|Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039}} paintings - Donated in August {{jalink|1612|Q6771}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in {{jalink|Ugusu}}, {{jalink|Nishiizu Town|Q1203949}}, {{jalink|Kamo District|Q961511}}, {{jalink|Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320}}. It is one of the {{jalink|Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|Shikinai shrines of Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{jalink|Shikinai shrine}}, it dates back to before {{jalink|927|Q30470}}, the 5th year of {{jalink|Enchō (era)|Q1327274|Enchō}}, when the '{{jalink|Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{jalink|Kotobank|Q11302260}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{jalink|1874|Q7761}} ({{jalink|Meiji|Q3125096}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{jalink|2022|Q49625}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{jalink|Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{jalink|1598|Q6800}} ({{jalink|Keichō|Q1328185}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{jalink|lantern|Q12012294}} - Dedicated in November {{jalink|1609|Q6762}} (Keichō 14) by {{jalink|Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{jalink|Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039}} paintings - Donated in August {{jalink|1612|Q6771}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949|1=Nishiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260|1=Kotobank}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761|1=1874}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625|1=2022}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800|1=1598}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294|1=Stone lantern}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762|1=1609}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746|1=Ōkubo Nagayasu}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039|1=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771|1=1612}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949|1=Nishiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260|1=Kotobank}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761|1=1874}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625|1=2022}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800|1=1598}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294|1=Stone lantern}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762|1=1609}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746|1=Ōkubo Nagayasu}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039|1=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771|1=1612}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949|1=Nishiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260|1=Kotobank}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761|1=1874}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625|1=2022}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800|1=1598}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294|1=Stone lantern}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762|1=1609}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746|1=Ōkubo Nagayasu}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039|1=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771|1=1612}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949|1=Nishiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260|1=Kotobank}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761|1=1874}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625|1=2022}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800|1=1598}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294|1=Stone lantern}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762|1=1609}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746|1=Ōkubo Nagayasu}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039|1=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771|1=1612}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.

'''Ugusu Shrine''' (うぐすじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugusu|1=UNKNOWN}}, {{ill|lt=Nishiizu Town|Q1203949|WD=Q1203949|1=Nishiizu}}, {{ill|lt=Kamo District|Q961511|WD=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|WD=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|Q11380552|WD=Q11380552|lt=Shikinai shrines of Izu Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}}<ref name="yuisho">Shrine grounds historical notice</ref>.

=== Overview ===
The date of foundation is unknown, but as it is a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinai shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}, it dates back to before {{ill|lt=927|Q30470|WD=Q30470|1=927}}, the 5th year of {{ill|lt=Enchō (era)|Q1327274|WD=Q1327274|lt=Enchō|1=Enchō}}, when the '{{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|WD=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}' was compiled<ref>[https://kotobank.jp/word/神名帳-82644 What is the Jinmyōchō] - {{ill|lt=Kotobank|Q11302260|WD=Q11302260|1=Kotobank}}</ref>.

From ancient times it was called Ugusu Daimyōjin / Mishima Daimyōjin and was revered as a deity of agriculture, fishing, and commerce, but in September {{ill|lt=1874|Q7761|WD=Q7761|1=1874}} ({{ill|lt=Meiji|Q3125096|WD=Q3125096|1=Meiji era}} 7) it was renamed Ugusu Shrine<ref name="yuisho"/>.

In {{ill|lt=2022|Q49625|WD=Q49625|1=2022}} (Reiwa 4), an event called “Wind Chime Shrine” was held, in which 240 wind chimes were decorated in the worship hall, hosted by Nishiizu Glass Studio<ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/fuurinjinnjya.pdf Wind Chime Shrine] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref><ref>[https://ikoyo-nishiizu.jp/glass/ Nishiizu Glass Studio] - Ikōyo Nishiizu</ref>.

=== Enshrined deity ===
* {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Tsumuha-yae Kotoshironushi no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}

=== Cultural properties ===
* Main hall - Constructed in March {{ill|lt=1598|Q6800|WD=Q6800|1=1598}} ({{ill|lt=Keichō|Q1328185|WD=Q1328185|1=Keichō}} 3)<ref name="yuisho"/>.
* Hanging {{ill|lt=lantern|Q12012294|WD=Q12012294|1=Stone lantern}} - Dedicated in November {{ill|lt=1609|Q6762|WD=Q6762|1=1609}} (Keichō 14) by {{ill|lt=Ōkubo Nagayasu|Q133746|WD=Q133746|1=Ōkubo Nagayasu}}<ref name="yuisho"/>. Designated Tangible Cultural Property of the prefecture<ref name="yuisho"/><ref>[https://www.town.nishiizu.shizuoka.jp/kakuka/kankou/kankou/meisyo/youmeiji.html Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town</ref><ref>[https://www.nishiizu-kankou.com/sightseeing/ugusujinjya Ugusu Shrine] - Nishiizu Town Tourism Association</ref><ref>[https://www.pref.shizuoka.jp/kankosports/bunkageijutsu/bunkazai/1002825/1041003/1041888/1004974/1021024.html Shizuoka Cultural Property Navi: Hanging Lantern] - Shizuoka Prefecture</ref>.
* {{ill|lt=Thirty-six Immortal Poets|Q671039|WD=Q671039|1=Thirty-Six Immortals of Poetry}} paintings - Donated in August {{ill|lt=1612|Q6771|WD=Q6771|1=1612}} (Keichō 17) by Hattori Daizō and two others<ref name="yuisho"/>.
